feat.name: Proud Mentor
feat.text: You enjoy mentoring others and take pride in your students' accomplishments. If you get a critical failure on an attempt to Aid, you get a failure instead. Whenever you successfully Aid an ally who critically succeeds on the check you Aided them on, you feel a rush of pride, gaining temporary Hit Points equal to your level, which last for 1 minute.

traits.name: Centaur
traits.text: Centaurs have humanoid upper bodies and equine lower bodies.
